name: ride
description: Ride file manager and office workspace.
author: Adham Cabral

scripts.docker:up: npm run docker:ensure-office && docker compose up -d --build
scripts.mobile:sync: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=1024 npm run build -w @ride/web && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=1024 npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:apk: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk} ANDROID_HOME=${ANDROID_HOME:-/opt/android-sdk} ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-/opt/android-sdk} ./gradlew --no-daemon --max-workers=1 assembleDebug
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ride/api && npm run build -w @ride/web
